Conversion Chart

Eco Aerospace Toolkit

Pristine Skies Score Calculator

Analyze aircraft efficiency, glide performance, fuel burn, and sustainability using tournament-style scoring formulas.

Scores are more meaningful when comparing multiple aircraft.
Fuel burn should be entered consistently as gallons per passenger.
CO₂ output should be entered consistently as kg per passenger.
This is a simplified educational model, not a certified aerospace engineering tool.
